languages.text: Спустя немного времени разведчики докладывают о пещеристом астероиде, сохранившем внутри гигантскую жилу ценного металла. Ее немедленно буксируют на флагман. Приближаться к ядру еще больше не рекомендуют техножрецы, служащие на шаттлах — смерть пилотов от радиации неизбежно приведет к безвозвратной потере священных машин.

A short time later, scouts report a cavern-filled asteroid with a giant vein of valuable metal inside. It will be hauled to the flagship immediately. The Tech-Priests serving on the shuttles do not recommend drawing any closer to the core — the death of pilots from radiation will inevitably lead to the irretrievable loss of sacred machines.
languages.original_text: Спустя немного времени разведчики докладывают о пещеристом астероиде, сохранившем внутри гигантскую жилу ценного металла. Ее немедленно буксируют на флагман. Приближаться к ядру еще больше не рекомендуют техножрецы, служащие на шаттлах — смерть пилотов от радиации неизбежно приведет к безвозвратной потере священных машин.

traits.locale_text: A short time later, scouts report a cavern-filled asteroid with a giant ingot of valuable metal inside. It will be hauled to the flagship immediately. The Tech-Priests serving on the shuttles do not recommend drawing any closer to the core — the death of pilots from radiation will inevitably lead to the irretrievable loss of sacred machines.

A short time later, scouts report a cavern-filled asteroid with a giant ingot of valuable metal inside. It will be hauled to the flagship immediately. The Tech-Priests serving on the shuttles do not recommend drawing any closer to the core — the death of pilots from radiation will inevitably lead to the irretrievable loss of sacred machines.

A short time later, scouts report a cavern-filled asteroid with a giant ingot of valuable metal inside. It will be hauled to the flagship immediately. The Tech-Priests serving on the shuttles do not recommend drawing any closer to the core — the death of pilots from radiation will inevitably lead to the irretrievable loss of sacred machines.

languages.text: しばらくして、偵察隊が洞窟のような巨大な隕石を発見。その中には、貴重な金属の塊が眠っていた。旗艦に運ばれることになった。シャトルに搭乗するテクノ司祭たちは、コアに近づかないことを勧める。パイロットが放射線で死んだら、神聖な機械は取り返しがつかない損失となる。
languages.original_text: A short time later, scouts report a cavern-filled asteroid with a giant ingot of valuable metal inside. It will be hauled to the flagship immediately. The Tech-Priests serving on the shuttles do not recommend drawing any closer to the core — the death of pilots from radiation will inevitably lead to the irretrievable loss of sacred machines.

traits.locale_text: しばらくして、偵察隊が洞窟のような巨大な隕石を発見。その中には、貴重な金属の塊が眠っていた。旗艦に運ばれることになった。シャトルに搭乗するテクノ司祭たちは、コアに近づかないことを勧める。パイロットが放射線で死んだら、神聖な機械は取り返しがつかない損失となる。

languages.text: Poco después, los exploradores informan de un asteroide cavernoso con una veta gigante de metal valioso en el interior. Pronto será llevado a la nave insignia. Los tecnosacerdotes que sirven en las lanzaderas recomiendan no acercarse más al núcleo. La muerte de los pilotos a causa de la radiación conllevaría la pérdida irreversible de máquinas sagradas.
languages.original_text: A short time later, scouts report a cavern-filled asteroid with a giant vein of valuable metal inside. It will be hauled to the flagship immediately. The Tech-Priests serving on the shuttles do not recommend drawing any closer to the core — the death of pilots from radiation will inevitably lead to the irretrievable loss of sacred machines.

traits.locale_text: Poco después, los exploradores informan de un asteroide cavernoso con una veta gigante de metal valioso en el interior. Pronto será llevado a la nave insignia. Los tecnosacerdotes que sirven en las lanzaderas recomiendan no acercarse más al núcleo. La muerte de los pilotos a causa de la radiación conllevaría la pérdida irreversible de máquinas sagradas.

languages.text: 不久，侦察队报告发现一颗布满孔洞的小行星，其内部蕴藏一条巨型贵金属矿脉。该资源随后将被立即拖回旗舰。于穿梭机上服役的技术神甫不建议继续靠近核心——飞行员若死于辐射，必将导致神圣机械的永久损失。
languages.original_text: A short time later, scouts report a cavern-filled asteroid with a giant vein of valuable metal inside. It will be hauled to the flagship immediately. The Tech-Priests serving on the shuttles do not recommend drawing any closer to the core — the death of pilots from radiation will inevitably lead to the irretrievable loss of sacred machines.

traits.locale_text: 不久，侦察队报告发现一颗布满孔洞的小行星，其内部蕴藏一条巨型贵金属矿脉。该资源随后将被立即拖回旗舰。于穿梭机上服役的技术神甫不建议继续靠近核心——飞行员若死于辐射，必将导致神圣机械的永久损失。

languages.text: Kurze Zeit später melden die Späher einen höhlenreichen Asteroiden mit einer riesigen Ader aus wertvollem Metall. Das Metall wird umgehend auf das Frachtschiff verladen. Die Techpriester an Bord des Shuttles raten von einer weiteren Annäherung an den Kern ab ... der Strahlungstod der Piloten würde unweigerlich zum unwiederbringlichen Verlust heiliger Maschinen führen.
languages.original_text: A short time later, scouts report a cavern-filled asteroid with a giant vein of valuable metal inside. It will be hauled to the flagship immediately. The Tech-Priests serving on the shuttles do not recommend drawing any closer to the core — the death of pilots from radiation will inevitably lead to the irretrievable loss of sacred machines.

traits.locale_text: Kurze Zeit später melden die Späher einen höhlenreichen Asteroiden mit einer riesigen Ader aus wertvollem Metall. Das Metall wird umgehend auf das Frachtschiff verladen. Die Techpriester an Bord des Shuttles raten von einer weiteren Annäherung an den Kern ab ... der Strahlungstod der Piloten würde unweigerlich zum unwiederbringlichen Verlust heiliger Maschinen führen.

languages.text: Kısa bir süre sonra kâşifler, içinde devasa bir değerli metal damarı bulunan mağaralarla dolu bir asteroit rapor ediyor. Derhâl sancak gemisine çekilecek. Mekiklerde görev yapan Tekno Rahipler, çekirdeğe daha fazla yaklaşılmasını önermiyor. Pilotların radyasyondan ölmesi, kaçınılmaz olarak kutsal makinelerin geri döndürülemez kaybına yol açacaktır.
languages.original_text: A short time later, scouts report a cavern-filled asteroid with a giant vein of valuable metal inside. It will be hauled to the flagship immediately. The Tech-Priests serving on the shuttles do not recommend drawing any closer to the core — the death of pilots from radiation will inevitably lead to the irretrievable loss of sacred machines.

traits.locale_text: Kısa bir süre sonra kâşifler, içinde devasa bir değerli metal damarı bulunan mağaralarla dolu bir asteroit rapor ediyor. Derhâl sancak gemisine çekilecek. Mekiklerde görev yapan Tekno Rahipler, çekirdeğe daha fazla yaklaşılmasını önermiyor. Pilotların radyasyondan ölmesi, kaçınılmaz olarak kutsal makinelerin geri döndürülemez kaybına yol açacaktır.

languages.text: Peu de temps après, les éclaireurs signalent la présence d'un astéroïde criblé de cavernes qui abriterait un énorme gisement de métal précieux. Il va être immédiatement tracté vers le vaisseau amiral. Les technoprêtres à bord des navettes déconseillent vivement de s'approcher davantage du noyau ; la mort des pilotes entraînerait inévitablement la perte irrémédiable des machines sacrées.
languages.original_text: A short time later, scouts report a cavern-filled asteroid with a giant vein of valuable metal inside. It will be hauled to the flagship immediately. The Tech-Priests serving on the shuttles do not recommend drawing any closer to the core — the death of pilots from radiation will inevitably lead to the irretrievable loss of sacred machines.

traits.locale_text: Peu de temps après, les éclaireurs signalent la présence d'un astéroïde criblé de cavernes qui abriterait un énorme gisement de métal précieux. Il va être immédiatement tracté vers le vaisseau amiral. Les technoprêtres à bord des navettes déconseillent vivement de s'approcher davantage du noyau ; la mort des pilotes entraînerait inévitablement la perte irrémédiable des machines sacrées.
